name: Chara has a message for you
description:
Your Autistic friend is at your window at night on July 7th.

This Chara has ADHD and a form of autism, why? Cuz I thought it would be cute and silly goofy. I basically just used google. I also got distracted and took an autism test, results in the discord.

I hope you enjoy, sorry to be behind on bots. I hope you enjoy it.
creator: Charawithatophat
